item.title:
New in Pomelli: Product Catalogs
Add your products or services, easily edit the descriptions, and u...
item.description:
New in Pomelli: Product Catalogs
Add your products or services, easily edit the descriptions, and use that catalog to generate ongoing personalized marketing campaigns and high-quality photoshoots, all grounded in your brand.
It’s free and available globally. @PomelliByGoogle https://t.co/TufLTbHzhJ
--- @joshwoodward | ❤️ 32 | 🔁 4 | 💬 0 | 👁 591
item.author: @joshwoodward

item.title:
Your Hermes Agent can now build full videos with the official HyperFrames skill by @HeyGen
HyperFra...
item.description:
Your Hermes Agent can now build full videos with the official HyperFrames skill by @HeyGen
HyperFrames videos are HTML-native, so your agent has total control over the final output
Video made entirely by Hermes using the HyperFrames skill https://t.co/uqWqu2VIeJ

item.title:
I exported my model that I can't for the life of me rig in Mixamo (it just throws me errors)
If any...
item.description:
I exported my model that I can't for the life of me rig in Mixamo (it just throws me errors)
If anyone can help THANK YOU
I need: - walk - run - jump - crouch - prone - climb - sit on an ATV quad :D
https://t.co/7qkmg5uEQx
--- @levelsio | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 1961

item.title:
Can you spot the dino? 🦖🔍
Consider this your official warmup for #GoogleIO. We're going live on May...
item.description:
Can you spot the dino? 🦖🔍
Consider this your official warmup for #GoogleIO. We're going live on May 19 at 10 a.m. PT with all our latest news, updates, and a few surprises.
Who's tuning in? → https://t.co/BJCe4w8BPR https://t.co/GRA9H9a2FW
--- @Google | ❤️ 99 | 🔁 24 | 💬 24 | 👁 9705
item.author: @Google

item.title: In the '80s, future MIT prof. Bill Freeman envisioned a three-sided zipper that could switch items b...
item.description:
In the '80s, future MIT prof. Bill Freeman envisioned a three-sided zipper that could switch items between soft & rigid states.
Last year, CSAIL revived his idea w/an automated design tool. It 3D prints "Y-zippers" that snap gear, robots, & art into place: https://t.co/GR7O4yFsVY
--- @MIT_CSAIL | ❤️ 7 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 769
item.author: @MIT_CSAIL
